remarks: Exceptional privacy meets modern luxury on over 2 secluded acres at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in Westport's sought-after Charcoal Hill neighborhood. Bordering a 7-acre Aspetuck Land Trust preserve, this rare property offers a peaceful, protected setting just minutes from downtown Westport, Coleytown schools, and the Merritt Parkway. Featuring 3 bedrooms, 3 full baths, and 2 additional flexible rooms, this thoughtfully designed home offers exceptional versatility beyond a traditional three-bedroom layout. Premium Bertazzoni appliances, Kohler fixtures, Marvin windows, and quality craftsmanship are showcased throughout. Two inviting wood-burning fireplaces create warm, welcoming gathering spaces, while a finished walk-out lower level with a full bath provides ideal space for entertaining, extended guest stays, or multi-generational living. Ample storage throughout and a garage with extra ceiling height add everyday convenience. Designed for modern comfort and efficiency, the home features a high-efficiency two-stage HVAC system integrated with whole-house SMART Insteon controls for seamless lighting and climate management. Enjoy the covered deck for outdoor dining and entertaining, or unwind on the private deck off the primary suite, where peaceful sunset views overlook the property's serene natural surroundings. This exceptional retreat offers the perfect blend of privacy, luxury, and convenience.
